calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Petitioners Petition For Order Confirming Arbitration Award Ccp 1285 Et Seq
Off Calendar Aug-23-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows:

PETITIONER FEE TITLE, INC. Notice Of Hearing On Petitioners Petition For Order Confirming Arbitration Award Ccp 1285 Et Seq is GRANTED. Arbitration award is confirmed in its entirety. Reasonable and necessary attorneys' fees incurred in conjunction with this petition granted in the amount of $1,750; costs granted in the amount of $835.

Order submitted. Judge: Charles F. Haines ; Clerk: L. Young ; Not Reported. (D501)
